mainEntity.name: Why AI Search Optimization Is Different Than Traditional Legal SEO
mainEntity.text: Why AI Search Optimization Is Different Than Traditional Legal SEO

acceptedAnswer.text: Traditional SEO is about keywords, but AI search is about context and trust. To rank in AI, your firm needs to be seen as the most relevant answer to a user's specific problem. We focus on building your brand’s "entity" in the eyes of the AI. If you're tired of losing leads to firms with better AI visibility, let's talk about a dedicated AI audit for your practice today.
